title: Workato MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Workato MCP Server for Claude

Access any application, workflows, or data via Workato's integration platform

- **Category:** mcp
- **Author:** Workato
- **Brand:** Workato / workato.com
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `automation` `workato` `integration` `workflow` `iPaaS`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http workato YOUR_WORKATO_MCP_URL && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "workato": {
    "url": "https://your-workspace.workato.com/mcp",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http workato YOUR_WORKATO_MCP_URL && claude mcp list

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/workato-mcp-server
- https://docs.workato.com/mcp.html
